message:
refactor(e2e,harness): executor batch optimization, harness test updates

Executor (fsqlite_executor.rs):
- Replace Vec<OpRecord>-cloning Batch struct with zero-copy BatchRange
  (start/end index into the shared records slice).  Eliminates per-batch
  allocation for workloads with thousands of operations.
- Add per-worker HashMap-based result verification and structured
  hot-path profile collection.
- Expand EngineRunReport with storage wiring details and per-worker
  error diagnostics.

realdb_e2e.rs:
- Minor import fix for updated report types.

Harness tests:
- bd_2csg6_2: update concurrent writer scaling demo for new
  Arc<Mutex<ConcurrentHandle>> API — replace registry.get_mut() with
  registry.get() → handle.lock() pattern.
- bd_d2m7: update BEGIN CONCURRENT cross-DB 2PC compliance test for
  shared handle API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
